prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `230f2e48`.
codex_response:
The rule for `230f2e48` is: each non-background object is a straight `5-2-...-0-2-...` arm on a `7` background; the output keeps the `5`-to-`0` stem, removes the `2`s beyond the `0`, and redraws the same number of `2`s perpendicular to the stem toward the grid interior. I implemented that in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_230f2e48/verifier.py#L4) and built a generator in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_230f2e48/generator.py#L110) that explicitly places sparse horizontal and vertical arms with the same fixed palette and object statistics. No new primitive was added.

The Sonnet summary had no entry. I used the Opus hint only for the object inventory and discarded its “turn toward the nearest edge” claim; the correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_230f2e48/notes.md#L1). Packaging is wired in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_230f2e48/__init__.py#L1).

Validation passed end to end: official verify `4/4`, generator smoke test `20/20`, shared build for `1000` examples, and generated verification `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/230f2e48/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/230f2e48/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/230f2e48/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/230f2e48/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/230f2e48/previews/preview_03.png).
